tasks.label: 🛡️ 1. Safety: Type Check
tasks.detail: Run this first! Catches bugs before they reach Reddit.

tasks.label: 🧪 2. Lab: Playtest
tasks.detail: Pick a sub to see live code changes.

tasks.label: 🚀 3. RELEASE: Patch (v1.x.X+1)
tasks.command: npx devvit upload --bump patch && npx devvit publish
tasks.detail: Daily Driver: Bumps the last digit and clears the <200 sub error.

tasks.label: 🥈 4. MINOR: Bump (v1.X.0)
tasks.command: npx devvit upload --bump minor && npx devvit publish
tasks.detail: Use for new features. Resets the patch digit to 0.

tasks.label: 💎 5. MAJOR: Bump (vX.0.0)
tasks.command: npx devvit upload --bump major && npx devvit publish
tasks.detail: Use for huge milestones. Resets minor/patch to 0.

tasks.label: 📸 6. Monitor: Live Logs
tasks.detail: Stream production logs from any sub.

tasks.label: 🔄 7. Maintenance: Update SDK
tasks.command: npx devvit update app && npm install
tasks.detail: Run once a week to keep your tools fresh.
